summary.key_theme: 比特幣價格在 75,000 美元關卡面臨強大阻力，加上聯準會利率政策的不確定性，導致 IBIT 等比特幣 ETF 近期表現疲軟且波動加劇。

bullish.title: Bitcoin ETFs Hit 6 Straight Days Of Inflows: Why Is BTC Going Up Again?
bullish.reason: 連續 6 個交易日的淨流入顯示機構投資者對 IBIT 等現貨 ETF 的需求依然穩健，為價格提供支撐。

bullish.title: The S&P 500 Is Down 2.5% But These 3 Bitcoin ETFs Didn’t Get the Memo
bullish.reason: 比特幣 ETF 在大盤回調時展現出一定的抗跌性與資產配置價值，吸引尋求避險的資金。

bullish.title: The Biggest Bitcoin ETFs As Prices Hold At $71,000
bullish.reason: 比特幣價格維持在 71,000 美元水準，顯示市場多頭情緒尚未完全消散，有利於 ETF 資產規模維持。

bearish.title: EXCLUSIVE: Bitcoin ETFs Under Pressure — Cyber Hornet CEO Explains The Volatility Gap Between IBIT And BBB
bearish.reason: IBIT 近期跌幅達 21%，表現明顯弱於其他同類產品，顯示其在市場波動中承受較大賣壓。

bearish.title: Bitcoin Down 2% After $75,000 Rejection: Why Is It Going Down?
bearish.reason: 比特幣無法突破 75,000 美元關鍵阻力位，技術面轉弱直接拖累追蹤該資產的 IBIT 股價。

bearish.title: Bitcoin Vulnerable: Fed May Signal Higher-For-Longer
bearish.reason: 聯準會維持高利率的預期增加，對高風險資產如比特幣構成壓力，進而影響 IBIT 的資金流入。

bearish.title: Shares of crypto-linked stocks are trading lower amid a drop in Bitcoin ahead of the Federal Reserve's interest-rate decision.
bearish.reason: 市場在聯準會利率決策前夕採取避險操作，導致加密貨幣相關股票與 ETF 普遍下跌。

bearish.title: MicroStrategy could surpass BlackRock's Bitcoin holdings within a week
bearish.reason: MicroStrategy 持倉量即將超越 BlackRock，可能削弱 IBIT 作為最大比特幣持有者的市場影響力與敘事優勢。

bearish.title: Michael Saylor Makes A Bitcoin Retirement Plan Possible If You're Willing To Risk It
bearish.reason: 將比特幣作為退休規劃的建議伴隨高風險警示，可能導致保守型投資者對 IBIT 等相關產品持觀望態度。

neutral.title: Should You Bet on the Recent Rally in Bitcoin & Ethereum ETFs?
neutral.reason: 文章僅提供投資分析建議，未對 IBIT 本身做出明確的買入或賣出評級。

neutral.title: Does This 1 New Trend Mean You Should Sell Gold and Buy Bitcoin Right Now?
neutral.reason: 探討黃金與比特幣的資產配置轉換，屬於投資策略討論，對 IBIT 股價無直接影響。

neutral.title: BTCI: Squeezing Yield With This 'Bitcoin-Adjacent' Income ETF
neutral.reason: 介紹另一款高收益 ETF (BTCI)，僅作為市場替代產品分析，不直接影響 IBIT。

neutral.title: What is Strategy’s STRC and will it help Saylor overtake BlackRock’s $55bn Bitcoin stockpile?
neutral.reason: 分析 MicroStrategy 的策略工具，屬於產業競爭觀察，對 IBIT 股價影響有限。

neutral.title: Strategy Just 23,000 Bitcoin Away From Surpassing BlackRock As Largest Holder
neutral.reason: 報導持倉數據變化，屬於事實陳述，未對 IBIT 的未來表現做出預測。
